ogTitle: South Yaamba vs Southedge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Yaamba and Southedge.
heading: South Yaamba vs Southedge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Yaamba, Queensland and Southedge, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Yaamba has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Southedge (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Yaamba or Southedge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Yaamba has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Southedge scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Yaamba scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Southedge scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Yaamba or Southedge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Yaamba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
